zone_registry.label: WEAK
zone_registry.why: Repeated across all annual primary classes but sign-unstable on current retained surfaces.

zone_registry.label: ACTIVE
zone_registry.why: Strongest repeated sign-separating boundary on the current grouped annual proxy surface; retained as ACTIVE only at that grouped boundary level rather than as a portable carrier rule.

zone_registry.label: WEAK
zone_registry.why: Repeated control-positive annual pattern with stronger continuation share and lighter suppressor mass, but still not a universal edge rule.

zone_registry.label: WEAK
zone_registry.why: Repeated control-negative annual pattern with heavier no-trade and aged-weak concentration, but still based on a bounded primary cohort.

zone_registry.label: WEAK
zone_registry.why: Frozen exact-subject triad supports a local sign pattern, but the bench is still too small for stronger promotion.

zone_registry.label: REJECTED
zone_registry.why: The strongest absolute year is still control-negative and drawdown-worse than control.

zone_registry.label: REJECTED
zone_registry.why: Positive and negative year groups both carry the same broad late low-zone shared pocket.

zone_registry.label: SUPERSEDED
zone_registry.why: Blocked-cohort splits show a mixed displacement-plus-suppression surface, and insufficient_evidence remains a sharper local suspect than a pure aged-weak-only story.

zone_registry.label: UNKNOWN
zone_registry.why: The current retained month surface does not yet expose a general enabled-vs-absent control map.

zone_registry.label: UNKNOWN
zone_registry.why: Flat periods remain useful anchors but are not yet proven to form one coherent structural class across annual and monthly levels.
